payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Partial lower-side crop of an antique dark mahogany wooden cabinet base, showing two paneled doors with brass drop handles, three small upper drawers with decorative knobs, carved ornate feet and a glossy varnished finish with minor scuffing; appears about 1.2 m from the camera.

message.content: {"label":"cabinet","short_description":"dark mahogany wooden cabinet base","long_description":"Partial lower-side crop of an antique dark mahogany wooden cabinet base, showing two paneled doors with brass drop handles, three small upper drawers with decorative knobs, carved ornate feet and a glossy varnished finish with minor scuffing; appears about 1.2 m from the camera.","attributes":["dark mahogany","wood","varnished glossy finish","ornate carved feet","brass drop handles","paneled doors","three small drawers","scuffed/worn edges","partial/edge-cropped","floor-level"],"distance_from_camera_m":1.2}
